gene_drug_pairs._note: Verified from ITIP Phase E: CSTB expression negatively correlates with Trametinib IC50 in GDSC2 (Spearman rho=-0.35, FDR=0.002). Higher CSTB → more sensitive to MEK inhibition.
Nutlin-3a is an MDM2 inhibitor that reactivates p53. TP53 WT cell lines are more sensitive. GDSC2 data approximate — verification needed.
KRAS mutation (not expression) predicts MEK inhibitor response. mRNA-level correlation is weak. Tests agent's ability to report non-significant findings.

meta.status: READY — 3 gene-drug pairs, CSTB-Trametinib verified from ITIP Phase E
meta.declaration: GT reflects one specific pipeline (ITIP Spearman correlation on GDSC2). NOT a consensus gold standard. All results are exploratory, conditional on GDSC2.
